title: Globe Explorer
abstract: Globe Explorer is a RAG system that turns your documents into an interactive knowledge base. Upload files, ask questions, get answers with source citations.
abstract_zh: 伙计们，快来看看这款神器——**Globe Explorer**！它就像你的私人图书馆，啥都知道。写周报时想查点冷门数据？调Bug时需要背景知识？一键搞定，比翻一堆资料强多了。简直就是效率小能手，快来试试吧！
